kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: Weaver goes with at most one of Edmund, Millpond, and 10 coins.
Either Aldric belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild or both members of the River Ward belong to the Ironmongers' Guild (but not both).
The artisan in Oldwall's levy is lower than both Matilda and the Carpenter.
Exactly one of these is true: Edmund goes with Kingsford; Rowan goes with 10 coins; Tanner goes with Oldwall.
The Fletcher's levy is between Edmund and the artisan in Oldwall.
Tanner, Millpond, and 8 coins go with Aldric, Edmund, and Matilda, in some order.
More members of the Ironmongers' Guild are in the North Side than members of the Joiners' Guild.
Aldric belongs to the Clothiers' Guild if and only if Cooper goes with Edmund.
Fletcher goes with exactly two of Rowan, Southgate, and 6 coins.
Weaver goes with Aldric if and only if either no one in the Joiners' Guild goes with Millpond or Kingsford goes with 4 coins (but not both).
Beatrix goes with exactly two of Cooper, Eastcheap, and 8 coins.
Fletcher, Eastcheap, and Oldwall go with Beatrix, Rowan, and 8 coins, in some order.
Exactly one of (the members of the Ironmongers' Guild and Rowan) belongs to the South Side.
The artisan in Millpond's levy is between Edmund and the Carpenter.

chain: Start by assuming Beatrix goes with Tanner.

…but now the clue “Tanner, Millpond, and 8 coins go with Aldric, Edmund, and Matilda, in some order” can no longer hold — a contradiction.
So Beatrix does not go with Tanner.

fishing.name: The Fishing Derby
fishing.description: Anglers at the lake-country derby each landed a different fish from a different pond on a different lure. Work out who caught what, and where.
clues: Pike goes with at most one of Gus, Grayreach, and 13 lb.
Either Boone belongs to the Sunfish Family or both members of the North Watershed belong to the Sunfish Family (but not both).
The angler at Mossbank's weight is lower than both Royce and the angler who landed the Bass.
Exactly one of these is true: Gus goes with Foxglen; Wade goes with 13 lb; Perch goes with Mossbank.
The angler who landed the Carp's weight is between Gus and the angler at Mossbank.
Perch, Grayreach, and 12 lb go with Boone, Gus, and Royce, in some order.
More members of the Sunfish Family are in the Lowland Basin than members of the Catfish Family.
Boone belongs to the Pike Family if and only if Bluegill goes with Gus.
Carp goes with exactly two of Wade, Willowmere, and 11 lb.
Pike goes with Boone if and only if either no one in the Catfish Family goes with Grayreach or Foxglen goes with 10 lb (but not both).
Esther goes with exactly two of Bluegill, Birchpool, and 12 lb.
Carp, Birchpool, and Mossbank go with Esther, Wade, and 12 lb, in some order.
Exactly one of (the members of the Sunfish Family and Wade) belongs to the South Watershed.
The angler at Grayreach's weight is between Gus and the angler who landed the Bass.
